Trevis Autotest2 retesting enforced review-dne-part-1 session for build 66905. Requested by Minh Diep because of LU-11170.

Patch Set 4:

Minh,

The two instances of find which the patch modifies:
        for file in $(ls ${TOPDIR}/lustre/contrib/patches/ofed/*.ed 2>/dev/null); do

In both cases, they are redirecting errors to /dev/null.

So that's silencing any errors printed by that command, basically?

Patch Set 4: Verified+1

Passed enforced test review-dne-part-1 on CentOS 7.0/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest2 from trevis-34vm6: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/8fd53891-27f3-4d4f-81c5-1969eca2c106 ran 6 tests.

Patch Set 4:

yes, we want the error to go in /dev/null so if there isn't any file, it's just empty
Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 4: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 26444d84c74e693e47c9785423e63402d32acb4f by Oleg Drokin

commit.subject: LU-12575 build: add ibutils2 for MOFED build
commit.message:
LU-12575 build: add ibutils2 for MOFED build

MOFED 4.6 include ibutils2 instead of ibutils
Remove ofed rhel5 patch which we don't need

Change-Id: I46c51eb8a194ea86bd8c951944e5c1427d0f37d0
Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35590
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nclark@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
